title: Projects
text: Welcome to the rabbit hole. Each project is a deep dive into something I found interesting — different data, different tools, same curiosity.

title: About
text:
I’m a data analyst based in Melbourne, currently rebuilding and levelling up my skills in data analytics and visualisation.
My tools of choice are R for analysis and Tableau for visualisation — and I’m always picking up something new.
Down the Rabbit Hole is where I document the process — messy data, interesting questions, and whatever I find when I dig in.

title: Down the Rabbit Hole
text:
hey, i’m yuelynn, just a girl with the curiosity of a cat and the memory of a goldfish.
which means i want to learn everything, dive as deep as possible into whatever catches my brain — and then forget all of it unless i do something with it. so this is that. a portfolio that’s also a paper trail of my own hyperfixations.
every few weeks, when the 3am wikipedia spiral hits, i pick a topic, find the data, do the research, and make something from it. the topics are completely random. the analysis isn’t.
get ready. enjoy the dive. 🐟

title: References & Resources
text:
AER Retail Performance Reporting Hub https://www.aer.gov.au/industry/retail/performance-reporting Main landing page for all quarterly Schedule 2/3/4 data files.
AER Retail Performance Data — Q4 2023–24 https://www.aer.gov.au/publications/reports/performance/retail-energy-market-performance-update-quarter-4-2023-24 5 quarters + 5 years annual data in Excel. Customer numbers, switching, complaints, hardship, disconnections by retailer and state.
AER Annual Retail Markets Report 2023–24 https://www.aer.gov.au/publications/reports/performance/annual-retail-markets-report-2023-24 Narrative companion to the data. Pricing, affordability, market concentration, switching trends.
AEMO Aggregated Price & Demand Data https://www.aemo.com.au/energy-systems/electricity/national-electricity-market-nem/data-nem/aggregated-data Wholesale price (RRP) and demand by state, 30-min intervals, back to 1998. CSV download per state per month.
AEMO Operational Demand Data https://www.aemo.com.au/energy-systems/electricity/national-electricity-market-nem/data-nem/operational-demand-data Half-hourly and daily demand by NEM region.

title: References & Resources
text:
AER Retail Performance Reporting Hub https://www.aer.gov.au/industry/retail/performance-reporting Main landing page for all quarterly Schedule 2/3/4 data files.

AER Annual Retail Markets Report 2023–24 https://www.aer.gov.au/publications/reports/performance/annual-retail-markets-report-2023-24 Narrative companion to the data. Pricing, affordability, market concentration, switching trends.

title: References & Resources
text:
DMO / VDO Reference Prices
AER DMO 7 Final Determination (2025–26) https://www.aer.gov.au/industry/registers/resources/reviews/default-market-offer-prices-2025-26 Most current DMO. Includes network cost breakdowns and retail margin methodology.
ESC Victorian Default Offer (VDO) Historical Decisions https://www.esc.vic.gov.au/electricity-and-gas/tariffs-and-benchmarks/victorian-default-offer VDO determinations — Victoria’s equivalent of the DMO, set by the ESC.

title: References & Resources
text:
Context & Background
AER State of the Energy Market 2025 — Chapter 6 (Retail) https://www.aer.gov.au/system/files/2025-08/State%20of%20the%20energy%20market%202025%20-%20Chapter%206%20-%20Retail%20energy%20markets%20and%20energy%20consumers.pdf Annual deep-dive into retail market. DMO/VDO trends, market concentration, pricing comparisons.
Australian Energy Statistics 2025 (DCCEEW) https://www.energy.gov.au/publications/australian-energy-update-2024 Official national energy stats — consumption, generation mix, renewables growth.

title: References & Resources
text:
Kaggle — Ready-to-Go Datasets
NSW Electricity Price & Demand 2018–2023 https://www.kaggle.com/datasets/joebeachcapital/nsw-australia-electricity-demand-2018-2023 Pre-cleaned AEMO data for NSW, 30-min intervals. Good for getting R pipeline running fast.
Victoria Daily Electricity Price & Demand 2015–2020 https://www.kaggle.com/datasets/aramacus/electricity-demand-in-victoria-australia Clean Victoria data. Slightly older but simple and ready to go.

title: Why retail energy?
text:
honest answer — i work in it.
i spend 9-5 in retail energy pricing, and apparently that’s not enough because here i am after hours, doing more energy stuff. a hyperfixation is a hyperfixation. first dive, and i’m already in the deep end — might as well see what’s down here.
at work, everything is outputs. direct results, deadlines, decisions. there’s no space to actually dig, to follow a thread just because it’s interesting, to ask questions that aren’t immediately useful. this is that space.
familiar waters means easier diving. i already know the landscape — DMO, VDO, wholesale price movements, hardship metrics — so i can spend less time decoding the context and more time doing actual analysis. the 2022 energy crisis is something i lived through professionally and never got to properly interrogate from the outside. time to fix that.
also price change season is coming up and i simply do not have the capacity to go deep on something completely foreign right now. so guess we’ll work with what we have! 🐟
more coming soon.
